channel.title: Alarm on Sleep as Android Docs
channel.description: Recent content in Alarm on Sleep as Android Docs

item.title: Alarm settings
item.description:
Alarm settings help you make your wake-up experience refreshing and enjoyable.

  • Smart wake up wakes you at the right stage of sleep
  • Gentle volume feature finds the minimum sound to wake you up
  • Smartlight natural sunrise alarm
  • Make sure you don’t oversleep with our CAPTCHA feature
  • And many more

Alarm defaults vs alarm-specific “per-alarm” settings#

Alarms can be set up in two places because you need a default configuration that controls all alarms and still have the option to create a special alarm with unique behavior.

item.title: Smart wakeup
item.description:
Looks for the best moment to wake you up for a great morning.

Waking up in light sleep feels natural - like on a weekend, without any alarm. In contrast, deep sleep wake up (which is common with ordinary alarm clocks) leads to an unpleasant experience accompanied with feeling of tiredness, sleepiness, disorientation.

Settings -> Alarms -> Smart wake up

With smart wake up, you set up a time window (also called Smart wake up period), in which you’d like to be woken up once it is the right moment.
